title: Canon PowerShot G7 X Mark III Digital Camera 20.1MP 4K Point-and-Shoot Camera – Black
short_description:
High-quality and compact Canon PowerShot G7 X Mark III digital camera, perfect for photography, travel, and vlogging. It features a powerful 20.1MP 1-inch CMOS sensor and records stunning 4K UHD video. The bright f/1.8–2.8 lens helps capture sharp images even in low-light conditions.

The camera has a 180° flip touchscreen, making it ideal for selfies and content creators. Built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth allow easy transfer of photos and videos to your phone or computer. Lightweight and portable, this camera is great for everyday use or professional content creation.

Camera is tested and fully functional, in great condition.
